response.step_by_step_log: Identified the song title "BANZAI" and the performer "Todoroki Hajime" from on-screen text and visual context. Simplified search query to "BANZAI Todoroki Hajime Japanese and English lyrics" to obtain the required data. The song runs throughout the video.
response.global_summary: A 3D music video performance of the song "BANZAI" by the VTuber Todoroki Hajime, featuring backup dancers.

scenes.description: Todoroki Hajime performing "BANZAI" with two hooded dancers on a concert stage with dynamic lighting and camera movements.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
バンザイ無能な命に
くだらない欲まがい物だって
無理やり飲んで僕はバンザイ

才能はゼロ
どうにかしちゃってるキャラ
おっがんさいはノー
だってなの

愛にもたれた言葉で心拍数
生きてくほど胸は沈んでく
どうなってんだろうな
この音が揺れるの

かい摘んでもしょうがねえ
汗かき稼ぐお金はどんだけ
あーだこーだ
そんなもんがうるせぇわな

バンザイ無能な命に
絡み回ってく脳を満たしてくれ
未来予想なんか賭けない
くだらない欲まがい物だってそれ

半端もののなら
言えない慣れた
朱色になって
僕は思い通り
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Banzai for an incompetent life
Drinking up even the silly, fake desires
I force myself to drink it and I'm Banzai

Talent is zero
A character that's somehow messed up
Oh, that's a no
That's what it is

My heart rate rises with words leaned on love
The more I live, the more my chest sinks
I wonder what's going to happen
With this sound shaking

It's no use to summarize it
How much money do I earn sweating?
This and that
Such things are noisy

Banzai for an incompetent life
Fill my brain that's intertwining and spinning
I won't bet on a future forecast
Even the silly, fake desires, that's it

If you're a half-baked person
I couldn't say it, I got used to it
Becoming vermilion
I am just as I wish
